data.body: When SUITE_TEST_INDEX is set, source red-zone.sh (via BASH_SOURCE). After test failure: look up test file in marker map. If marker found, parse failing test names, check if all >= red zone line. All in zone -> TOLERATED (increment SUITE_TOTAL_TOLERATED, don't count as failure). Unparseable -> FAIL conservatively. Summary: PASSED: N  FAILED: N  TOLERATED: N. No change when unset.
